name: The Sun Gallery
description: The corridor opens onto a breathtaking chamber stretching far beyond the reach of your lanterns.
Endless rows of golden grain sway gently beneath brilliant white lights suspended high overhead,
their impossible radiance imitating a summer afternoon. Water flows silently through carefully carved
stone channels while tiny brass constructs continue tending the crop as though their makers had left only yesterday.
Something rustles deep within the wheat.TODO: AI Text
